tool_args.label: Safety Manager evaluations supersede task force inspections

tool_args.label: Negative Net Position explanation

payload.claim_text: The negative Net Position consists of various fund balances such as surplus monies and purchase of assets on behalf of MTA and NYCTA. The negative balance occurs because the assets are transferred to MTA and NYCTA during the year, and taken off the B&T Statement of Net Position; while the debt to purchase these assets remains as a liability on the Statement of Net Position of B&T.
payload.subject: B&T Net Position
payload.description: Explanation of negative net position on B&T balance sheet
